name: Huntingdon Savings Bank
description_short: Huntingdon Savings Bank is a single-location community bank in Pennsylvania offering full-service banking since 1923, with FDIC insurance and ACH/wire transfer capabilities.
description_long: Huntingdon Savings Bank has operated continuously since 1923, serving the financial needs of customers in Huntingdon County, Pennsylvania for over a century. The bank maintains a single full-service branch location at 423 Penn Street in Huntingdon, PA 16652, operating as a brick-and-mortar institution with in-person banking services. The bank is FDIC-insured (Certificate #30031) and holds routing number 231372507 for both ACH transactions and wire transfers. As a traditional community bank, it represents a long-established local financial institution rather than a modern digital-first bank. The bank's strength lies in its longevity and local market presence, with staff described by customers as knowledgeable and professional. However, the bank appears to lack a significant digital footprint—no official website is listed in available records, and online banking services are not prominently advertised. For customers seeking a traditional, relationship-based banking experience in central Pennsylvania, this institution offers stability and local familiarity, though those expecting modern digital conveniences or multiple branch locations should look elsewhere.
services: Wire transfers for real-time bank-to-bank transactions
Full-service in-person banking at 423 Penn Street branch
pros: FDIC-insured (Certificate #30031), providing deposit protection up to $250,000
Operating continuously since 1923, demonstrating over 100 years of stability and local market presence
Full-service branch offering checking accounts, savings accounts, and loan products
Supports both ACH transactions (direct deposits, bill payments) and wire transfers
Staff rated as knowledgeable, professional, helpful, and friendly by recent customers
Located in downtown Huntingdon with convenient Penn Street address
5.0 out of 5 star rating based on available customer reviews
cons: Single branch location only—no geographic flexibility or branch network access
No official website available, limiting digital banking information and self-service options
Online banking services not prominently advertised or clearly available
Limited to serving Huntingdon County area, not suitable for customers with statewide or national banking needs
Lack of digital presence suggests potential limitations in modern banking conveniences
best_for: Long-time Huntingdon residents seeking stable, relationship-based community banking
Local business owners and professionals requiring in-person banking services and loan access
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and established local financial institutions over digital convenience
diagnosis: Huntingdon Savings Bank is best suited for customers in the Huntingdon, PA area seeking a traditional community bank with over a century of local history and FDIC protection. The primary caveat is the lack of digital banking infrastructure and single-branch model, making it unsuitable for customers requiring online banking, multiple locations, or a modern digital experience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
